title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Paytm Money - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
